content: Some general comments first before I take a more in-depth review: * Formatting of actions: Please use and tags, e.g. MOVE dir. * Formatting of HP and AP values: Consider formatting the values using , e.g. 40 HP. * End conditions: Please use separate sections for Victory and Defeat. You may refer to the page below as a reference: https://www.codingame.com/ide/puzzle/git-patchwork * Input sections: Please add "space-separated" or "separated by a space" to all applicable lines. * Constraints: Please show one constraint per line. * Cover picture: Consider adding a cover picture for the puzzle. * Viewer: Are you going to add an opening sequence? Thanks.
